allow: Bash(PWD_GEN=$\(grep "Using generated security password" /tmp/pizzaria-run.log | sed -E 's/.*password: //' | tr -d ' ' | tail -1\); echo "=== GET /cardapio/lista \(autenticado\) ==="; curl -s -u "user:$PWD_GEN" -H "Accept: application/json" http://localhost:8080/cardapio/lista; echo; echo; echo "=== GET /cardapio/1 \(autenticado\) ==="; curl -s -u "user:$PWD_GEN" -H "Accept: application/json" http://localhost:8080/cardapio/1 | head -c 800; echo)
